stages.name: Human-Only Development
stages.summary_markdown: All observation, decision-making, execution, and evaluation are performed by humans.
stages.emotional_shift_markdown: Identity is tightly coupled to typing, recall, and direct control.
stages.sacred_cows_markdown:
- Code literacy equals competence
- Architecture is a human-only activity

stages.name: Human Commands the Loop
stages.summary_markdown: AI provides mechanical and cognitive leverage but never initiates action.
stages.core_agency_statement: Humans decide every step; AI responds.
stages.emotional_shift_markdown: Letting go of typing as the primary expression of skill.
stages.sacred_cows_markdown:
- Fast typing matters
- Remembering APIs is valuable

stages.name: Human Supervises the Loop
stages.summary_markdown: Humans define conditions and guardrails; the system selects and sequences tasks.
stages.core_agency_statement: Humans decide boundaries; systems decide actions.
stages.emotional_shift_markdown: Loss of continuous situational awareness in exchange for throughput.
stages.sacred_cows_markdown:
- Reading every test
- Understanding all code paths

stages.name: Human Is Inside the Loop
stages.summary_markdown: The system decides when to consult humans; humans provide grounding and judgment.
stages.core_agency_statement: Systems hold operational agency; humans hold normative agency.
stages.emotional_shift_markdown: Trust without visibility; judgment without context.
stages.sacred_cows_markdown:
- Needing to read code
- Needing to understand architecture

stages.name: Personal Sovereign Systems (Beyond Scope)
stages.summary_markdown: Each human has a continuously adapting system that builds software only for them.
stages.core_agency_statement: Systems build; humans ground their own reality.
stages.emotional_shift_markdown: End of shared software and intermediary roles.
